word: H510 - אַלְקוּם - ʼalqûwm - al-koom' - No rising up

sections.paragraph:
Original: אלקוּם

Transliteration: 'alqûm

Phonetic: al-koom'

BDB Definition:

  1. (TWOT) (negative adverb) no, not, nor, neither
  2. (BDB) band of soldiers
  3. (CLBL) no rebellion, no uprising (literally)

Origin: probably from H408 and H6965

TWOT entry: 90

Part(s) of speech:
